## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (new var / class)

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] New/changed `vars/` steps have a matching `.txt` doc file
- [ ] Names are consistent across README, Jenkinsfile, vars, src and resources
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed
- [ ] Linked the related issue (if any)
